prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2GR-FSE (3.5L V6 direct-injection) from the Lexus IS F, retaining the Blade Master's 6-speed U661E automatic transmission but upgrading the torque converter to a Sonnax billet unit with a 3,500 RPM stall speed for aggressive launches

Forced induction via a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (specific to the 2GR-FSE) with a custom intercooler setup using a PWR 450mm core and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft kit and ARP head studs for 11.5:1 static compression

Full exhaust system overhaul with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel setup featuring a Fujitsubo Giken Legalis R 76mm dual-exit muffler, preceded by a Berk Technology 304 stainless steel header and a custom 2.5-inch catted downpipe with a 200-cell GESI catalytic converter for emissions compliance
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (specific to the Blade Master's E150 chassis) with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a vented hood featuring a Lexus LFA-style central scoop for the intercooler

OEM+ aggressive stance via Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear), paired with Tein Flex Z coilovers with custom valving for the Blade Master's multilink rear suspension

Full Rocket Bunny Aero Series 3 lip kit (front bumper, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with a custom carbon fiber GT wing (1,800mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on Cusco GT-spec aluminum pedestals, finished with a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and Lexus IS F-style LED taillight overlays
